\title{Anomalous Transport in a Two-Dimensional Electron Gas}
\author*[1,2]{Alice Anderson}
\email{alice.anderson@university-a.edu}
\author[2]{Bob Baker}
\address[1]{Department of Physics, University A, City A, Country A}
\address[2]{National High Field Laboratory, City B, Country B}
\abstract{We report anomalous transport signatures in a two-dimensional electron gas and analyze their temperature dependence.}
\keywords{transport, two-dimensional electron gas}
